title: Pan-Seared Japanese Crusted Fish
description: A delicate Japanese-inspired dish featuring a crispy sesame crust on a pan-seared fish fillet. Serve with steamed vegetables for a well-rounded meal.

ingredients.name: Sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: Toasted in a pan for added flavor

instructions: 2. Rinse the fish fillet and pat it dry with paper towels.
3. In a pan, toast the sesame seeds over medium heat until lightly browned.
4. In a shallow dish, mix together the sesame seeds, crusted breadcrumbs, and grated ginger.
5. Dip the fish fillet in the sesame seed mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
6. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add a small amount of oil.
7. Add the fish fillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
8. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
9. Serve hot with steamed vegetables and a side of French au feu sauce if desired.
